case_title: CDW CORPORATION VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT et al

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CDW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT THURGOD MARSHALL ACADEMIC HIGH SCHOOL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF JOHN D GUERRINI RE: INTEREST ON JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CDW CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CDW CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT THURGOD MARSHALL ACADEMIC HIGH SCHOOL $4,757.47 PRINCIPAL, $214.11 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,151.58, ** THIS IS A SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
